'''Clem Robins''' is a comic book letterer who worked on a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series. Robins began working in comics for [[Wikipedia:Gold Key Comics|Gold Key Comics]] in [[1977]] and soon contributed to [[Wikipedia:DC Comics|DC Comics]] and [[Marvel Comics]] as well. Since then he has worked for many comic book companies and has also worked as a courtroom illustrator for television.

==Star Wars bibliography==
===Letterer===
*[[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]]
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters]]''
*''[[This Crumb for Hire]]''
